title: Floris Schrama
description: The layout seems quite simple at first sight, but then there's a cool 3D transition to swap categories.

analysis.title: Home - Floris Schrama, Identity, WAX Print, Autonomous, Studio

bodyText.text: Floris Schrama is an experimental visual artist and songwriter. Currently working full time as a Senior designer at Vlis

sample.text: Floris Schrama is an experimental visual artist and songwriter. Currently working full time as a Senior designer at Vlis
From September 2019 Floris works as a Senior Designer at Vlisco and Vlisco&co. At Vlisco he focuses on making new wax pr
From Januari 2017 -2019 Floris has worked as a Designer/ Art Director/ Artist on several Identity design projects such a
In 2017 Floris Schrama released the second album of his music project Het Gloren called Overvloed.
From oktober 2010 – 2016 he was Co-owner/ Founder of design agency Kok Pistolet. A design agency focussing on Visual Ide
April 2010 he released the first album of his music project Het Gloren, 'Glorie123' at recordlabel ‘Beep! Beep! Back up
From september 2007 – september 2010 Floris worked as a designer at Studio Dumbar, Rotterdam, on several identity projec
From september 2006 – september 2007 Floris worked as a designer at The Royal Academy of Art, The Hague.
In 2006 Floris graduated Cum Laude Graphic & Typographic Design at The Royal Academy of Art, The Hague.
2006 graduated as a Bachelor of Communication, at Inholland Rotterdam

30 Okt t/m 4 Nov 2017
Creative direction Sound of the citées, Genk, Belgium

13 t/m 21 Okt 2017
Workshop Zelvendam, Festival De Betovering, Den Haag.

28 May 2017
Overvloed Festival, album release second album of Het Gloren, Overvloed at EKKO, Utrecht.

17 – 25 Oktober 2015
Exhibition, New Window, Dutch Design Week, Eindhoven

14 Oktober 2015
Discussion, VPRO Tegenlicht Meet Up, Delft

26 September – 4 Oktober 2015
Exhibition, New Window, Graphic Design Festival, Breda

24 Oktober 2014
Het blauwe uur, exhibition, Museumnacht, Delft

September + Oktober 2014
Poster exhibition, EKKO, Utrecht

19 – 27 Oktober 2013
Poster exhibition, Dutch Design Week, Eindhoven

9 Oktober 2013
Lecture, Imsomnia Festival, Tromso Norway

25 – 27 Oktober 2013
Exhibition, Fernweh, Depot BG, Amsterdam

27 – 29 September 2013
Exhibition, Fernweh, Dynamo Expo, Amsterdam

27 September 2013 
Lecture, Let’s Talk Design, Rotterdam

28 Januari 2012
Lecture, Open Dag Royal Academy of Art, Den Haag

7 Juni 2011
Lecture, What’s Up? #39, Pakhuis de Zwijger, Amsterdam

2010
Performance, Opening European Design Awards -’Sniff & Kiss’
Vlisco/ Spring Festival/ Het Nutshuis/ Ando Graphic/ Theatergroep De Warme Winkel/ Designkwartier Den Haag/ Vlaams Cultu
Just Haasnoot, Wassenaar/ Edwin Pelser, Den Haag

Dutch Design Awards 2013
Finalist Communication ‘Waar is Ekko?’

International Poster and Graphic Design Festival Chaumont 2013
Shortlisted Poster campaign ‘Waar is Ekko?’

International Poster and Graphic Design Festival Chaumont 2013
Shortlisted Poster campaign ‘Alma’

Prijs de prijs 2011
Shortlisted best Dutch art award ‘De Gulden Snede’

Red Dot Awards 2010
Winner eventstyle ‘Dutch Design Awards 2009’′

European Design Award 2009
Silver Cookbook TNT ‘Masterchefs For Home Chefs’

Graduation Royal academy of Art, The Hague 2006
Cum Laude

Type Directors Club New York 2005 
Excellence in Typography (as an intern at Studio 't Brandt Weer, The Hague)
Since September 2019 Floris is working full time as a WAX Print Designer at Vlisco. Vlisco has been designing and manufa
